# neon_restore_snapshot (Action)

Restores a snapshot in a Neon project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
action "neon_restore_snapshot" "example" {
  project_id       = neon_project.example.id
  snapshot_id      = "snap-example-id"
  name             = "restored-branch"
  finalize_restore = true
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) The Neon project ID.
- `snapshot_id` (String) The snapshot ID to restore.

### Optional

- `finalize_restore` (Boolean) Set to true to finalize the restore operation immediately. Defaults to false to allow previewing the restored snapshot data first.
- `name` (String) A name for the newly restored branch. If omitted, a default name will be generated.
- `target_branch_id` (String) The ID of the branch to restore the snapshot into. If not specified, the branch from which the snapshot was originally created will be used.
